description: Time-course comparison config for the accepted VIS320 and GAD diffusion-only runs, using analysis-config paths so the comparison script can resolve each completed sample output folder automatically.
notes: This is a diffusion-run time-course comparison config for the accepted VIS320 and GAD n=3 datasets.
Each sample points to its config under configs/analysis/diffusion so the script can infer the completed output folder and ROI folder.
Tracer-level plots are built from all included samples, with thin sample traces and bold tracer means.
Bold tracer means and uncertainty bands are only drawn where all samples contribute, which avoids edge artifacts from slightly staggered final time points.
figure_title: Time Course Comparison: VIS 320 vs GAD Diffusion Runs
